playbook.intent: Empty content slot → 1 indexed asset live each week (blog / changelog / doc).
playbook.scope: Solo founder ships one indexed asset per week (blog post, changelog, doc page): topic chosen against keyword + ICP, draft generated with AI then human-edited, on-page SEO complete, shared on 2 channels. Exit artifact is indexable URL + 2 shares.

success-criteria.criterion: 1 asset published per week with on-page SEO complete
Asset shared on 2 channels (Reddit / IH / HN / X / LinkedIn)
Internal link added from 1 existing page

stage.name: Pick topic
stage.intent: Pick a topic that hits keyword + ICP at once.

tasks.task: Pick topic with monthly volume + low difficulty

stage.decision-gate: Advance when topic has keyword + ICP fit. Refuse generic 'just write something'.

stage.name: Draft
stage.intent: AI draft + human edit. Voice matters more than length.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when voice reads as human + concrete. Stay if it sounds AI-generic.

stage.name: Optimise
stage.decision-gate: Advance when on-page checklist complete. Refuse to publish without title/meta.

stage.name: Share
stage.decision-gate: Required output: 2 distribution posts. Without distribution, indexing is the only chance.

extra.value: [Long-tail SEO campaigns — separate quarterly, Paid distribution — organic only here]
['Blog/docs infrastructure live (sitemap, indexable)', Keyword + ICP shortlist exists]
[Publishing without distribution — indexing alone doesn't move needle solo-scale, 'AI-generic drafts — readers detect tone instantly, refuse to share']
['Could I share this with my ICP without cringing at AI-tells?', 'Did the post get indexed within 7 days, or is something broken in the sitemap?']
{human: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-push --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-push --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-content-seo-push --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
